title: Rich Flaky Brazilian Parmesan Stir-fry
description: A flavorful, nut‑free stir‑fry that balances tender chicken, crisp vegetables, and a savory Parmesan finish for a crowd‑pleasing Brazilian twist.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium‑high heat. Add the sliced chicken and stir‑fry until browned and cooked through, about 4‑5 minutes. Remove chicken and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil to the skillet. Toss in the onion, carrots, and broccoli florets; stir‑fry for 2 minutes.
Add the bell pepper juliennes, garlic, and ginger; cook until vegetables are bright and tender yet still crisp, about 3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet. Pour in soy sauce and honey; stir to coat everything evenly. Cook for another 2 minutes, allowing flavors to mingle.
Sprinkle the grated Parmesan over the stir‑fry. Let it melt and form a fluffy, flaky crust on top, stirring once to distribute the cheese.
Serve hot over steamed rice or quinoa, if desired, and enjoy the creamy, savory finish.
Optional: finish with a squeeze of lime or a sprinkle of fresh cilantro for extra brightness.
